summary: Verstappen hunts a third consecutive victory at the Red Bull Ring, where Mercedes' upgraded power unit threatens to finally close the gap on the championship leader. Alpine's surprise podium push with Gasly reignites questions about strategy and car performance, while McLaren and Ferrari battle for the scraps in a middle-field war that could reshape the constructors' standings. A win for any non-Red Bull challenger would inject genuine unpredictability into a season that Verstappen has controlled, potentially signaling the first genuine threat to his title defense.
